description_long: This is a small, pyramid-shaped stone object intricately carved with Egyptian motifs on all four faces. The front face features a detailed depiction of a pharaoh's bust, complete with headdress and hieroglyphic inscriptions. The two side faces each display a profile of a different Egyptian figure, both surrounded by vertical columns of hieroglyphs. The rear face shows a camel with a rider, also framed by hieroglyphs, adding a narrative element to the artifact. The stone has a weathered, slightly glossy finish, with a color palette dominated by beige, off-white, and dark brown tones. The carvings are deep and well-defined, giving the object a tactile, historical appearance reminiscent of ancient Egyptian souvenirs or decorative markers.
description: A small, pyramid-shaped stone intricately carved with Egyptian figures, hieroglyphs, and a camel scene, featuring a weathered, glossy finish in beige and dark brown.
description_view_0: The front face displays a pharaoh's bust with a headdress, surrounded by hieroglyphs.
description_view_1: This side shows a profile of an Egyptian figure with a headdress, bordered by vertical hieroglyphs.
description_view_2: The rear face features a camel with a rider, framed by hieroglyphic inscriptions.
description_view_3: The opposite side presents another Egyptian profile, distinct from the first, also bordered by hieroglyphs.
attribute_location: urban park decorative area or themed garden
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on a pedestal or ground surface
attribute_pattern: Deeply carved Egyptian motifs and hieroglyphs, with regular, symmetrical arrangement on each face
attribute_weathering: Slightly weathered with a glossy patina, minor surface wear visible on raised carvings
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with natural elements but complements themed or historical urban decor, typically not blended with vegetation
